basic_details.job_title: MGU Animal Laboratory Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has released the official Animal Laboratory Attendant Notification 2026 on 19 May 2026 at Mahatma Gandhi University Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the MGU Animal Laboratory Attendant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 56 years with a qualification of Plus Two along with two years experience in Animal Laboratory care or a training certificate from a government institution can attend the walk-in interview on 26 May 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 56 years

qualification.education_qualification: Plus Two, Two years experience in Animal Laboratory care or training certificate from government institution
qualification.details: Plus Two with two years experience in Animal Laboratory care or training certificate from a government institution.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for MGU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for Mahatma Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 is Animal Laboratory Attendant. This is a contractual position within the university.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Animal Laboratory Attendant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Animal Laboratory Attendant post in the Mahatma Gandhi University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online; they must attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Animal Laboratory Attendant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Animal Laboratory Attendant position is Rs. 560 Per Day. This is a daily wage payment structure.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Animal Laboratory Attendant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Plus Two and possess two years of experience in Animal Laboratory care or a training certificate from a government institution.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the Animal Laboratory Attendant post is between 18 years (minimum) and 56 years (maximum).

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the MGU Animal Laboratory Attendant Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 26 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 560/- for General/OBC category candidates. Other categories might have different fees or exemptions as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The specific venue for the Walk-in Interview will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for detailed venue information.
